testcase.name: example_get_scatterplotmatrix_stats.Rd
testcase.system-out: `get_scatterplotmatrix_stats()` was deprecated in teal.modules.general 0.6.1. ℹ The scatterplot matrix module now uses GGally::ggpairs() which handles correlation display natively. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─teal.modules.general (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:155:7 2. │ ├─testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 3. │ └─testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 4. ├─teal.modules.general (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 5. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:24:3 6. ├─testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. │ └─testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. │ └─testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. │ ├─testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. │ │ ├─base::withRestarts(...) 11. │ │ │ └─base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. │ │ │ └─base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. └─pkgload::run_example(...) 16. └─base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. ├─base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. └─base::eval(ei, envir) 19. └─base::eval(ei, envir) 20. └─teal.modules.general::get_scatterplotmatrix_stats(...)

skipped.message: Reason: distribution initializes with short validation error ('test-examples.R:145:9')
Reason: ggmosaic issue: will be resumed via the issue #925 in tmg ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_association.R:51:3')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_g_bivariate_Setting_encoding_inputs_produces_outputs_without_validation_errors.

error.message: Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms. ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_bivariate.R:197:3')

testcase.error:
Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable
ℹ You can inspect the failed AppDriver object via `rlang::last_error()$app` ℹ AppDriver logs: {shinytest2} R info 15:25:24.77 Start AppDriver initialization {shinytest2} R info 15:25:24.86 Starting Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 15:25:26.12 Creating new ChromoteSession {shinytest2} R info 15:25:26.17 Navigating to Shiny app {shinytest2} R info 15:25:26.18 Injecting shiny-tracer.js {chromote} JS info 15:25:26.22 shinytest2; jQuery not found {chromote} JS info 15:25:26.22 shinytest2; Loaded {shinytest2} R info 15:25:26.22 Waiting for Shiny to become ready {shinytest2} R info 15:25:28.10 Waiting for Shiny to become idle for 200ms within 120000ms {shinytest2} R info 15:25:28.14 Error while initializing AppDriver: Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: shiny {shiny} R stderr ----------- Attempting to load the environment ‘package:sparkline’ {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.data {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.code {shiny} R stderr ----------- Loading required package: teal.slice {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- You are using teal version 1.1.0.9021 {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Attaching package: ‘teal’ {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- The following objects are masked from ‘package:teal.slice’: {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- as.teal_slices, teal_slices {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Running application in test mode. {shiny} R stderr ----------- {shiny} R stderr ----------- Listening on http://127.0.0.1:6738
Caused by error in `app_initialize_()`: ! Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms. Message: An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Caused by error in `app_wait_for_idle()`: ! An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─teal.modules.general (local) app_driver_tm_g_bivariate() at test-shinytest2-tm_g_bivariate.R:197:3 2. │ └─teal.modules.general:::init_teal_app_driver(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_g_bivariate.R:8:3 3. │ ├─testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:26:3 4. │ └─TealAppDriver$new(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:29:7 5. │ └─teal (local) initialize(...) 6. │ ├─base::suppressWarnings(...) 7. │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 8. │ ├─withr::with_envvar(...) 9. │ │ └─base::force(code) 10. │ └─super$initialize(...) 11. │ └─shinytest2:::app_initialize(...) 12. │ ├─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 13. │ └─shinytest2:::app_initialize_(self, private, ..., view = view) 14. │ ├─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 15. │ └─self$wait_for_idle(duration = 200, timeout = private$load_timeout) 16. │ └─shinytest2:::app_wait_for_idle(...) 17. │ └─shinytest2:::app_abort(self, private, "An error occurred while waiting for Shiny to be stable") 18. │ └─rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call) 19. │ └─rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 20. │ └─base::signalCondition(cnd) 21. ├─shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 22. │ └─shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 23. │ └─rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call) 24. │ └─rlang:::signal_abort(cnd, .file) 25. │ └─base::signalCondition(cnd) 26. └─shinytest2 (local) `<fn>`(`<rlng_rrr>`) 27. └─shinytest2:::app_abort(...) 28. └─rlang::abort(..., app = self, call = call)
